specs.title: cp-000: SelectionToolbar style choices are Normal text Heading 1 Heading 2 Heading 3 and
cp-001: SelectionToolbar bold button toggles the bold mark on mouse down to preserve sel
cp-002: SelectionToolbar italic button toggles the italic mark on mouse down to preserve
cp-003: SelectionToolbar underline button toggles the underline mark on mouse down to pr
cp-004: SelectionToolbar strikethrough button toggles the strike mark on mouse down to p
cp-005: SelectionToolbar inline-code button toggles the code mark on mouse down to prese
cp-006: SelectionToolbar highlight main click toggles the highlight mark without choosin
cp-007: SelectionToolbar highlight palette opens from the highlight button context menu
cp-008: SelectionToolbar highlight palette colors are yellow fef08a green bbf7d0 blue bf
cp-009: SelectionToolbar link action uses windowpromptURL previousUrl
cp-010: Cancelling the link prompt leaves the current link state unchanged
cp-011: Entering an empty string in the link prompt removes the current link mark
cp-012: Entering a non-empty string in the link prompt extends the current link mark ran
cp-013: SelectionToolbar comment button dispatches scholarsynceditor-action with action
cp-014: SelectionToolbar AI Edit button dispatches scholarsyncai-action with action prec
cp-015: LinkPopover intercepts clicks on a tags inside the editor DOM and prevents the b
cp-016: LinkPopover starts in read mode when opened from an inline link
cp-017: LinkPopover edit input placeholder is https
cp-018: LinkPopover pressing Enter in edit mode saves the new URL
cp-019: LinkPopover pressing Escape in edit mode exits edit mode without applying additi
cp-020: LinkPopover Open in new tab uses windowopenurl _blank noopenernoreferrer
cp-021: LinkPopover Remove link unsets the mark and closes the popover
cp-022: Slash menu empty state text is No commands found
cp-023: Slash menu width is fixed at w-80
cp-024: Slash menu max height is 400px with internal vertical scroll
cp-025: Slash menu category labels render as BASIC BLOCKS ACADEMIC AI TOOLS and DOCUMENT
cp-026: Slash menu resets the selected row to index 0 whenever the item list changes
cp-027: Slash menu scrolls the selected row into view whenever the selected index change
cp-028: Slash menu ArrowUp wraps from the first item to the last item
cp-029: Slash menu ArrowDown wraps from the last item back to the first item
cp-030: Slash menu Enter runs the highlighted command and consumes the key event
cp-031: Slash menu Escape hides the popup and consumes the key event
cp-032: Slash menu popup placement is bottom-start
cp-033: Slash menu popup offset is 0 4
cp-034: Slash menu popup uses interactive true and trigger manual
